title: Bloody Shaders
description: "Basically, a Minecraft shader to create a darker, bloodier atmosphere this October 31st for Halloween. Enjoy it, and have a Happy Halloween.
body:
## Bloody Shaders
![trece](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73b59d121b805fc9c4bf47c2afd0d9c82fd7663e.png)
### Description
Bloody Shaders is designed to give Minecraft a darker, more apocalyptic atmosphere. By adding a red-tinted fog, this shader brings a gloomy, somber touch to the game, perfect for those who want an eerie and unsettling experience.

Realistic Water: Replaces vanilla water with a highly optimized, realistic water effect, adding a more immersive experience.

Pixelated Shadows: New pixelated shadows for a more atmospheric and unsettling vibe.

Red Fog Effect: The shader adds a red fog that creates a haunting, end-of-the-world vibe across landscapes, making the game feel eerie and melancholic.

Future Features:
Stay tuned for upcoming updates, which will include:

Additional lighting and shadow improvements.
New fog colors and effects to further enhance the atmosphere.

Note:
Feedback and suggestions are very welcome! Let me know what you’d like to see improved or added in future updates.
